arts.ttl: Harry Kane spotted swapping shirts with an old Tottenham teammate after hat-trick
arts.sum: Harry Kane was spotted swapping shirts with one of his old Tottenham teammates after his hat-trick for Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich, Manchester City, Manchester United, FC Barcelona all vying for Xavi Simons; Bayer Leverkusen taking one more run at Jonathan Tah?; Arsenal-Real Madrid to swap stars?; Dani Olmo out 4-5 weeks; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich won 1-6 against Holstein Kiel; Cyler and Samrin break down the performance, wonder what Max Eberl is thinking when it comes to Leon Goretzka, discuss whether Uli Hoeness should still have a voice in sporting matters at Bayern and more: Bayern Munich is rumored to have its eyes on Paris Saint-Germain loanee Xavi Simons as a 2025 summer transfer window target.

arts.ttl: Dinamo Zagreb vs Bayern Munich: 2024 Champions League league stage full coverage
arts.sum: Bayern Munich kick off the brand new edition of the UEFA Champions League league stage (still a stupid name by the way) with a trip to Croatia to face GNK Dinamo Zagreb. Catch our full coverage of Bayern Munich’s Champions League clash against Dinamo Zagreb right here!

arts.ttl: Dinamo Zagreb ready for Champions League showdown with Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Dinamo Zagreb knows it facing an uphill battle against Bayern Munich in the Champions League on Tuesday, but that does not mean that the squad is just going to roll over and take an “L.” When asked about potentially scoring against the Bavarians, the striker said some other things were more important: “Scoring against Bayern?

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Manuel Neuer looking forward to Champions League journey
arts.sum: Bayern Munich goalkeeper Manuel Neuer has been around the block a few times, so preparing for the Champions League is old hand to the veteran by this point. We’re looking forward to the start tomorrow,” Neuer said (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Campus Round Up: Bunch of late drama, a player makes his comeback after 19 month absence, UEFA Youth League is about to begin and more...
arts.sum: Brilliant work by striker Jonah Kusi-Asare and Kurt Rüger set up Maximilian Wagner for the crucial first goal in the 87th before a beautifully floated cross from Adam Aznou found the head of Kusi-Asare in the 93rd minute whose header was deflected into the back of the net by an unfortunate defender. Bayern dominated and pushed Aubstadt back far into their own half, but a goal was not to come.

arts.ttl: Transfer Update: Leon Goretzka could leave Bayern Munich this winter
arts.sum: Goretzka was heavily linked with a move away from Bayern during the summer transfer window, but nothing wound up materializing despite Max Eberl making it clear to the player he really is not in Vincent Kompany’s primary plans for this season. Goretzka is hardly playing under Vincent Kompany, so it could be time for him to part ways with Bayern.

arts.ttl: "We felt more comfortable" - Bayern chief explains Matthijs de Ligt sale to Man Utd
arts.sum: Bayern Munich director of sport Max Eberl defends the club's decision to sell defender Matthijs de Ligt to Manchester United this summer.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich chief hands Man City, Real Madrid additional Jamal Musiala transfer boost
arts.sum: Bayern Munich chief Max Eberl admits that it will be "difficult" to agree a contract extension with Manchester City and Real Madrid-linked Jamal Musiala.

arts.ttl: Arsenal & Bayern Munich expressed summer interest in Girona star
arts.sum: Two of the continent’s leading clubs expressed a keen interest in the signature of a member of the defensive ranks at La Liga outfit Girona over the summer. That’s according…
